reasoning: Koren, we're focusing on attacking your main limiter: poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride was relatively low intensity, so we'll control efforts today with over-unders to specifically improve these areas. Mastering this will enhance your ability to sustain 220-235W on the Alpine Loop's main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x: 6 minutes at 201-218W, followed by 3 minutes at 242-256W. Short recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
